question: Big Bash League: Perth Scorchers vs Sydney Sixers (Game Qualifier 1) - Most Sixes Sydney Sixers Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between Perth Scorchers and Sydney Sixers scheduled for 2026-01-19 in Big Bash Final Stage.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Perth Scorchers will be considered correct if Perth Scorchers is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Sydney Sixers.The outcome corresponding to Sydney Sixers will be considered correct if Sydney Sixers is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Perth Scorchers.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Big Bash League: Perth Scorchers vs Sydney Sixers (Game Qualifier 1) - Team Top Batter Perth Scorchers Winner
description:
This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between Perth Scorchers and Sydney Sixers scheduled for 2026-01-19 in Big Bash Final Stage.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Perth Scorchers will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from Perth Scorchers.
The outcome corresponding to Sydney Sixers will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from Sydney Sixers.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: BPL: Chattogram Challengers vs Durbar Rajshahi (Game Quarter Finals)
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Chattogram Challengers and Durbar Rajshahi scheduled for January 20 2026 in BPL.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50

question: BPL: Chattogram Challengers vs Durbar Rajshahi (Game Quarter Finals) - Toss Match Double Chattogram Challengers Winner
description:
This market refers to the combination of the pre-match coin toss and the final match result for the cricket match between Chattogram Challengers and Durbar Rajshahi scheduled for 2026-01-20 in BPL T20 Final Stage.
This market resolves according to (1) the official toss result and (2) the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Chattogram Challengers will be considered correct if  Chattogram Challengers is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
The outcome corresponding to Durbar Rajshahi will be considered correct if Durbar Rajshahi is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.
DLS/DRS adjustments, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, Super Over, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a match winner are treated as ordinary wins. If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the tiebreak winner will be considered the match winner for this market. If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

description:

This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between Rangpur Riders and Sylhet Strikers scheduled for 2026-01-20 in BPL T20 Final Stage.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Rangpur Riders will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from Rangpur Riders.
The outcome corresponding to Sylhet Strikers will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from Sylhet Strikers.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 20, 5PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market refers on the tennis match between Francisco Cerundolo and Damir Dzumhur in the Australian Open ATP, scheduled for January 20 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Cerundolo' if Francisco Cerundolo advances against Damir Dzumhur.

This market will resolve to 'Dzumhur' if Damir Dzumhur advances against Francisco Cerundolo.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: FC Südtirol vs. US Catanzaro 1929: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Serie B game between FC Südtirol and US Catanzaro 1929, scheduled for January 31 at 9:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Südtirol and US Catanzaro 1929 combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legab.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Map Handicap: PLS (-1.5) vs TEAM ORUGA (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Players and TEAM ORUGA in the CCT South America Series #7 Group Stage, scheduled for January 18 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Players" if Players wins 2 or more maps than TEAM ORUGA in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "TEAM ORUGA".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Series: Weibo Gaming Kill Handicap (-16.5) vs Top Esports (+16.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Top Esports and Weibo Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 19 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Weibo Gaming" if Weibo Gaming secures 17 or more kills than Top Esports in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Top Esports".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 20, 7PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Al Ittihad Saudi Club vs. Al Najmah Saudi Club: O/U 1.5
description:
In the upcoming Saudi Pro League game between Al Ittihad Saudi Club and Al Najmah Saudi Club, scheduled for February 1 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Al Ittihad Saudi Club and Al Najmah Saudi Club combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on spl.com.sa. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

description:
